member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Clients.MitsubishiMcPlcClient
member.summary: Provides a Mitsubishi MC protocol PLC client implementation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Clients.MitsubishiMcPlcClient.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The Mitsubishi MC Binary 3E frame builder.
The Mitsubishi MC Binary 3E response parser.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Clients.MitsubishiMcPlcClient.Options
member.summary: Gets the Mitsubishi MC connection options.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Devices.MitsubishiMcDeviceCodeMapper
member.summary: Maps common Dreamine PLC device types to Mitsubishi MC protocol device codes.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Devices.MitsubishiMcDeviceCodeMapper.Map(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType)
member.summary: Converts a common PLC device type to a Mitsubishi MC device code.
member.returns: The Mitsubishi MC device code result.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions
member.summary: Represents connection options for Mitsubishi MC protocol communication.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.Host
member.summary: Gets or sets the PLC host address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the PLC port.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.NetworkNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the network number.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.PlcNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the PLC number.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.DestinationModuleIoNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the request destination module I/O number.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.DestinationModuleStationNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the request destination module station number.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.MonitoringTimer
member.summary: Gets or sets the monitoring timer.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.ConnectTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.SendTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the send timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.ReceiveTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the receive timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.FrameFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets the MC frame format.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.TransportType
member.summary: Gets or sets the MC transport type.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions.RetryCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the retry count for send/receive operations. UDP uses this value for timeout retransmission. TCP treats values less than one as one attempt.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcTransportType
member.summary: Defines the transport type used by Mitsubishi MC protocol communication.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcTransportType.Tcp
member.summary: Uses TCP transport.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcTransportType.Udp
member.summary: Uses UDP transport.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EFrameBuilder
member.summary: Builds Mitsubishi MC protocol Binary 3E request frames.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EFrameBuilder.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EFrameBuilder.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Devices.MitsubishiMcDeviceCodeMapper)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The Mitsubishi MC device code mapper.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EFrameBuilder.BuildBatchReadFrame(Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Builds a batch read request frame.
member.param: The number of devices to read.
Whether the request accesses bit devices.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EFrameBuilder.BuildBatchWriteWordsFrame(Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Int16})
member.summary: Builds a batch word write request frame.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EFrameBuilder.BuildBatchWriteBitsFrame(Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Options.MitsubishiMcConnectionOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Builds a batch bit write request frame.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EResponse
member.summary: Represents a parsed Mitsubishi MC Binary 3E response.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EResponse.#ctor(System.UInt16,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EResponse.EndCode
member.summary: Gets the MC protocol end code.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EResponse.Data
member.summary: Gets the response data payload.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EResponse.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets whether the response indicates success.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EResponseParser
member.summary: Parses Mitsubishi MC protocol Binary 3E response frames.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EResponseParser.Parse(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Parses a raw Binary 3E response frame.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EResponseParser.ParseReadWords(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Parses word values from a Binary 3E read response frame.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcBinary3EResponseParser.ParseReadBits(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Parses bit values from a Binary 3E read response frame.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcCommand
member.summary: Defines Mitsubishi MC protocol command codes.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcCommand.BatchRead
member.summary: Batch read command.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcCommand.BatchWrite
member.summary: Batch write command.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcDeviceCode
member.summary: Defines Mitsubishi MC protocol device codes for binary frames.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcDeviceCode.SM
member.summary: Special relay.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcDeviceCode.SD
member.summary: Special register.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcDeviceCode.X
member.summary: Input relay.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcDeviceCode.Y
member.summary: Output relay.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcDeviceCode.M
member.summary: Internal relay.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcDeviceCode.D
member.summary: Data register.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcDeviceCode.B
member.summary: Link relay.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcDeviceCode.W
member.summary: Link register.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcDeviceCode.R
member.summary: File register.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcDeviceCode.ZR
member.summary: File register ZR.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcEndian
member.summary: Provides little-endian byte writing helpers for Mitsubishi MC binary frames.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcEndian.WriteUInt16LittleEndian(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{System.Byte},System.UInt16)
member.summary: Writes a 16-bit unsigned integer as little-endian bytes.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcEndian.WriteUInt24LittleEndian(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a 24-bit unsigned integer as little-endian bytes.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcFrameFormat
member.summary: Defines Mitsubishi MC protocol frame formats.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcFrameFormat.Binary3E
member.summary: Binary 3E frame.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcFrameFormat.Ascii3E
member.summary: ASCII 3E frame.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcSubCommand
member.summary: Defines Mitsubishi MC protocol sub-command codes.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcSubCommand.Word
member.summary: Word device access.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Protocol.MitsubishiMcSubCommand.Bit
member.summary: Bit device access.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcBinary3ESimulatorProtocol
member.summary: Executes a minimal Mitsubishi MC Binary 3E protocol simulation for read/write tests.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcBinary3ESimulatorProtocol.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory,Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcBinary3ESimulatorProtocol.StatusChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the simulator has a diagnostic status message.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcBinary3ESimulatorProtocol.Execute(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Executes one Binary 3E request frame and returns a Binary 3E response frame.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions
member.summary: Defines options for the Mitsubishi MC protocol simulator server.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions.Host
member.summary: Gets or sets the server bind address. Use 127.0.0.1 for same-PC tests and 0.0.0.0 for cross-PC tests.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the server port.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions.EnableAutoWordResponse
member.summary: Gets or sets whether a single word write to the trigger address updates the response address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions.AutoResponseTriggerDeviceCode
member.summary: Gets or sets the device code used as the handshake trigger device.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions.AutoResponseTriggerOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the trigger word offset.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions.AutoResponseDeviceCode
member.summary: Gets or sets the device code used as the handshake response device.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions.AutoResponseOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the response word offset.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions.AutoResponseIncrement
member.summary: Gets or sets the value increment used for the automatic handshake response.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcTcpSimulatorServer
member.summary: Provides a minimal Mitsubishi MC Binary 3E TCP simulator server for local and cross-PC tests.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcTcpSimulatorServer.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcTcpSimulatorServer.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcTcpSimulatorServer.StatusChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the server status changes.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcTcpSimulatorServer.IsRunning
member.summary: Gets whether the server is running.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcTcpSimulatorServer.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the MC TCP simulator server.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcTcpSimulatorServer.StopAsync
member.summary: Stops the MC TCP simulator server.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcUdpSimulatorServer
member.summary: Provides a minimal Mitsubishi MC Binary 3E UDP simulator server for local and cross-PC tests.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcUdpSimulatorServer.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcUdpSimulatorServer.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcSimulatorServerOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcUdpSimulatorServer.StatusChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the server status changes.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcUdpSimulatorServer.IsRunning
member.summary: Gets whether the server is running.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcUdpSimulatorServer.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the MC UDP simulator server.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Simulation.MitsubishiMcUdpSimulatorServer.StopAsync
member.summary: Stops the MC UDP simulator server.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Transport.FakeMitsubishiMcTransport
member.summary: Provides a fake Mitsubishi MC transport for tests and protocol verification.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Transport.FakeMitsubishiMcTransport.SentFrames
member.summary: Gets the frames sent through this fake transport.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Transport.FakeMitsubishiMcTransport.EnqueueResponse(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Enqueues a response frame to return from the next send/receive operation.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Transport.IMitsubishiMcTransport
member.summary: Defines a transport boundary for Mitsubishi MC protocol communication.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Transport.IMitsubishiMcTransport.IsConnected
member.summary: Gets whether the transport is currently connected or ready.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Transport.IMitsubishiMcTransport.ConnectAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects or prepares the transport.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Transport.IMitsubishiMcTransport.DisconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disconnects the transport.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Transport.IMitsubishiMcTransport.SendAndReceiveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a request frame and receives the response frame.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Transport.TcpMitsubishiMcTransport
member.summary: Provides a TCP transport implementation for Mitsubishi MC protocol communication.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MC.Transport.UdpMitsubishiMcTransport
member.summary: Provides a UDP transport implementation for Mitsubishi MC protocol communication.
